records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Henpecked (hn"pkt`); p. pr. & vb. n. Henpecking.]

defs: To bother persistently with trivial complaints; to subject to petty authority; -- said of a woman who thus treats her male companion, especially of wives who thus dominate their husbands. Commonly used in the past participle (often adjectively); as, henpecked for years, he finally left her.
